name: Roofmaster
tagline: North Bay roofing done right, since the start
seoDescription: Roofmaster is a Santa Rosa roofing contractor serving the North Bay with re-roofs, leak repairs, flat roofs, dry rot work, and seamless gutters.

sections.heading: Santa Rosa's roofing crew for re-roofs, leaks, and flat-roof fixes
sections.subheading: Residential and commercial roofing across Santa Rosa and the North Bay — composition, shake/tile conversions, cool roofs, dry rot repair, and seamless gutters.

items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

sections.heading: About Roofmaster
body: Roofmaster is a locally based roofing contractor at 1104 Calistoga Rd in Santa Rosa, serving homeowners and businesses throughout the North Bay. The company handles the full range of roofing work — from full re-roofs and energy-saving composition shingles to hot tar and cool roofs, shake-to-tile conversions, dry rot repair, and seamless gutters.

Customers across Yelp, Angi, and BBB describe a crew that shows up on time, communicates clearly, and responds quickly when a roof starts leaking. From leak repairs and flat-roof work to complete roof replacements, Roofmaster focuses on durable, well-finished results for North Bay properties.
highlights: Serving Santa Rosa & the North Bay

items.title: Re-Roofing & Replacement
items.description: Complete residential and commercial re-roofs, including energy-saving composition shingles built to hold up to North Bay weather.

items.title: Roof Leak Repairs
items.description: Fast response on leaks — the crew comes out quickly to diagnose and repair roof issues before they cause more damage.

items.title: Flat & Cool Roofs
items.description: Hot tar and cool roof systems for flat and low-slope roofs, helping reduce heat and protect commercial and mobile-home structures.

items.title: Shake & Tile Conversions
items.description: Conversions from wood shake to tile or composition, upgrading older roofs to lower-maintenance, fire-conscious systems.

items.title: Dry Rot Repair
items.description: Replacement of damaged wood in eave and roof areas, repairing dry rot before new roofing goes on.

items.title: Seamless Gutters
items.description: Seamless gutter installation to move water off the roof and away from the structure.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Roofmaster and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: Their entire crew was punctual and courteous. They not only got our roof done on time, but painted all of the sheet metal on top.
items.author: Santa Rosa homeowner

items.quote: We had a major leak and got a quote from Mark within 24 hours of calling — he put us on the schedule right away.
items.author: North Bay customer

sections.heading: Work with Roofmaster
sections.body: Find us at 1104 Calistoga Rd. Call (707) 539-9739 — we’re glad to help.
